metcon.name: Cindy’s Double Snatch
metcon.description:
Partner workout
You-go-I-go
30 double unders
5 pull ups
10 push ups
15 air squats
5 power snatches @ 50/35
Scale reps or weight so each round is less than 2 mins per person

hypertrophy.reasoning: Cindy taxes quads, shoulders, chest, triceps heavily; accessory targets posterior chain and biceps for balance.

raw_text:
Warm up | 10 scap push ups
10 scap pull ups
10 air squats
10m toe walk
10m heel walk
10 row-rotate-press
10 WGS (5 p/s)
3  muscle snatches
3  power snatches
2 mins easy skipping
Cindy’s Double Snatch | Partner workout
You-go-I-go
30 double unders
5 pull ups
10 push ups
15 air squats
5 power snatches @ 50/35
Scale reps or weight so each round is less than 2 mins per person
siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: Cindy’s Double Snatch. Workout: Partner workout, You-go-I-go, 30 double unders, 5 pull ups, 10 push ups. For hypertrophy, focus on hamstrings, glutes, rear delts.
